name: RedPajama-INCITE-Base-3B-v1
note: First RedPajama model; strongest open 3B at launch (HELM 0.406), runs on a single consumer GPU.

results.notes: LAMBADA-OpenAI accuracy, zero-shot lm-evaluation-harness subset reported in the official launch blog (matches Table 7 of the later RedPajama technical paper, arXiv 2411.12372, exactly: 0.6541).
HellaSwag acc_norm, zero-shot lm-evaluation-harness subset (also confirmed in arXiv 2411.12372 Table 7: 0.6317).
Winogrande accuracy, zero-shot lm-evaluation-harness subset (also confirmed in arXiv 2411.12372 Table 7: 0.6322).
PIQA accuracy, zero-shot lm-evaluation-harness subset (also confirmed in arXiv 2411.12372 Table 7: 0.7470).

verificationNotes: Confirmed via together.ai/blog/redpajama-models-v1 (published May 5, 2023): HELM table shows RedPajama-INCITE-Base-3B-v1 = 0.406 vs LLaMA-7B 0.465, matching exactly. HF model card confirms '2.8B parameter pretrained language model', GPT-NeoX architecture, Apache 2.0 license, 800B training tokens. Context length 2048 (2K) corroborated by independent sources on the RedPajama-INCITE family.
